title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Dadan, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Dadan, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's no good, we can't stop him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It looks like you're still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: even if it costs me my body,
